prompts.title: Supercar
prompts.prompt: Use the uploaded reference photo. Do not change the Subject’s facial features. The Subject must look 1000% identical to the uploaded images. Subject is seated slightly off-center on a bright red beanbag chair inside a sleek, dimly lit luxury showroom, positioned directly in front of a vivid red supercar whose angular front bumper, sharp air intakes, and glossy black detailing dominate the midground and anchor the composition. The Subject wears an all-black outfit: a matte black leather jacket with structured seams and folded cuffs, oversized black leather trousers that pool heavily around the ankles, and chunky black platform shoes with high-shine surfaces that catch the low ambient lighting. The Subject’s arms are crossed in a relaxed, confident posture, with subtle reflections from the showroom lights emphasizing the textures of the leather throughout the outfit. Behind the Subject, the showroom ceiling features bold, linear black slats running diagonally across the frame, creating strong depth as soft reflections from overhead fixtures glimmer faintly. To the right, a glossy black croc-embossed duffel bag sits on the speckled concrete floor—its structured handles, metal hardware, and textured surface illuminated by diffused light drifting from the car’s reflection. To the left, another red beanbag and subtle racing-themed decor add controlled pops of color without distracting from the Subject. The supercar behind the Subject gleams under directional lighting: its sculpted hood shifts from deep shadows to hot reflections along its curves, black rims nestle beneath aerodynamic fenders, and the polished windshield captures faint interior reflections. In the background, a mirrored wall reveals reversed silhouettes of showroom signage, racing helmet displays, and stylized circuit-track outlines along a matte dark wall. Fine, realistic micro-details—dust speckles on the concrete, tiny reflections dancing across the leather surfaces, faint fingerprints on the duffel bag’s glossy texture, and dramatic shadow falloff around the Subject’s shoes—create a fully HD, natural, and authentic look, as if photographed with an iPhone camera. Do not alter the Subject’s face. Maintain all facial details exactly as shown in the reference photo.

prompts.title: Misterio hermoso
prompts.prompt: Recrea esta escena usando la foto que envié como referencia, manteniendo el mismo encuadre, pose, iluminación y estilo que la imagen de ejemplo. La composición debe mostrar un retrato femenino de medio cuerpo, con la modelo sentada y ligeramente inclinada hacia adelante. El brazo derecho debe cruzar el cuerpo, con la mano izquierda apoyada suavemente sobre el brazo opuesto, transmitiendo elegancia y seguridad. La expresión facial debe ser serena, segura y ligeramente enigmática. La mirada debe dirigirse a la cámara, con los labios suavemente cerrados y una postura firme. El atuendo consiste en un conjunto oscuro y sofisticado: un blazer negro estructurado sobre una blusa negra ajustada. El cabello debe ser suelto, liso y bien coordinado, cayendo naturalmente sobre un hombro. La iluminación debe ser de estudio, con luz direccional suave y contrastada (estilo Rembrandt o luz lateral), que resalte los contornos del rostro, creando sombras elegantes y un sutil degradado en el fondo. El fondo debe ser liso y neutro, en tonos gris oscuro, con ligera profundidad y sin elementos que distraigan. El estilo final debe ser en blanco y negro, con un contraste refinado, una textura de piel suave y un aspecto realista de retrato editorial. Formato vertical (1080x1920), relación de aspecto vertical, calidad fotográfica de estudio profesional y un acabado cinematográfico y realista.

prompts.title: fashion editorial
prompts.prompt: Фотография в стиле fashion-editorial. Девушка (с загруженной фотографии лицо не изменять ) сидит в большом белом мягком кресле, спина слегка откинута назад, поза уверенная и расслабленная. Ноги скрещены, колени направлены вперёд. На ней длинный тёмно-коричневый плащ из лакированной кожи с тиснением «под крокодила», с широкими плечами и поясом на талии. Под плащом — чёрные прозрачные колготки. На ногах — остроносые туфли-лодочки на каблуке в том же тёмно-коричневом цвете и фактуре лакированной кожи «под крокодила», что и плащ. prompts.title: Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic professional fashion photograph. SUBJECT & IDENTITY (TEXTUAL LOCK) The subject is an adult young man with a slim, youthful build. Face shape is narrow oval with soft bone structure, gentle jawline, and a straight nose. Eyes are expressive and slightly wide-set. Skin texture is clean and natural with visible pores, smooth surface, and subtle tonal variation. No acne, no pimples, no inflammation. No retouching. No beautification. No AI smoothing. Hair is medium length, naturally wavy, slightly messy, with loose strands falling forward. The subject wears thin, round metal-framed eyeglasses. Posture is upright but tense, shoulders slightly raised, conveying alertness. This description must be followed exactly. No facial or body alteration. No stylization. SCENE This is a real fashion photograph shot by a professional photographer. This is NOT an illustration. This is NOT a drawing. This is NOT a graphic poster. This is NOT a cinematic or fantasy frame. Location: controlled studio or neutral indoor environment. Background: deep matte red backdrop with subtle texture, evenly lit, non-graphic. Atmosphere: serious, restrained, grounded in reality. Fashion intent: conceptual fashion editorial portrait, photographic only. POSE — FIXED GEOMETRY The subject is turned in a three-quarter back-facing pose. Upper body angled away from camera. Head turned back over the shoulder toward camera. One hand holds a long, thin object (wooden or metal rod) resting diagonally across the back. Shoulders slightly hunched under a heavy garment. No pose variation. No action. EXPRESSION & GAZE Gaze direction: looking back toward the camera from the corner of the eyes. Facial expression: focused, alert, restrained. No smile. No dramatization. CAMERA & COMPOSITION Professional still photo camera. Lens: 85mm. Camera height: eye level. Distance: medium portrait distance. Perspective: natural compression. Framing: mid-torso portrait. Orientation and aspect ratio: vertical, 4:5. No wide-angle. No cinematic framing. LIGHTING Lighting follows strict studio photography rules. Main light: neutral directional key light from the front/side. Secondary fill: minimal, only to retain facial detail. No rim drama. No volumetric light. No flares. Shadow behavior: realistic, controlled, non-illustrative. COLOR & TONALITY Restricted photographic color palette. Dominant colors: deep red background, muted neutrals in clothing. Natural contrast only. No color grading. No posterized tones. No HDR. WARDROBE & MATERIALS The subject wears a heavy, textured outer garment resembling a coat or cloak. Fabric appears thick, matte, and tactile with visible weave and folds. Inner clothing remains minimal and neutral. All materials obey real gravity and light behavior. BACKGROUND Real studio background only. Matte red surface with subtle imperfections. No graphic patterns. No paint strokes. No illustration artifacts. REALISM & OUTPUT Strict professional photographic realism. Subtle photographic grain allowed. Natural imperfections preserved (excluding skin blemishes). No stylization. No digital polish. STRICT PROHIBITIONS No illustration. No drawing. No engraving. No comic style. No cinematic look. No fantasy aesthetics. No text, logos, or watermarks. NEGATIVE PROMPT illustration, drawing, sketch, engraving, woodcut, comic, poster art, graphic style, cinematic, movie still, fantasy, CGI, VFX, dramatic lighting, color grading, acne, pimples, skin inflammation, plastic skin, HDR, AI-generated appearance

prompts.title: Polaroid poses
prompts.prompt: Use the same girl as reference: keep her facial features consistent, preserve her natural hair color and hair length. Background inside each shot is a plain light wall, evenly lit but with a slight shadow halo around her. No harsh reflections on the glossy instant-film borders; soft, natural highlights along the white frames. Girl: hair voluminous at the roots, styled in glamorous soft waves. One side is often tucked behind the ear to reveal the earrings. The hair has a smooth, glossy finish; it looks free and natural yet neatly styled. In some playful shots, the ends flick outward slightly from movement. Outfit & fabrics: elegant strapless evening dress in a deep, dark tone. Bodice has a structured, corset-inspired shape with a sweetheart neckline, slightly plunging. Fabric is a mix of matte base and sheer or semi-sheer organza or tulle overlays that create soft, sculpted folds along the neckline and bust. The dress is fitted through the torso, emphasizing the waist. Accessories & styling: small to medium statement earrings in a metallic finish (simple hoops or geometric drops) catching points of light from the flash. Makeup is polished evening glam: even, luminous skin, contoured cheeks, highlighted cheekbones and collarbones, defined brows, soft smoky eyes, and plush lips with a satin or glossy finish. Polaroid poses (3–4 distinct shots): 1. Classic beauty portrait: she faces slightly three-quarters toward the camera, shoulders angled, chin elongated, gaze direct and confident. One arm relaxed, the top edge of the strapless dress cleanly visible. Expression calm, poised, very editorial. 2. Strong posture shot: shoulders back, one hand placed on hip, elbow bent to create a sharp line; torso subtly twisted to emphasize the neckline and waist. Head tilted a little, gaze to the side as if caught mid-turn. Long hair flows over one shoulder and down the back, some strands loose near the collarbone. 3. Playful kiss-face: mid-chest crop, body slightly leaned forward toward the lens, lips pursed in a pout or kiss, eyes wide or gently squinted. Optional extra: candid laugh or smirk, shoulders relaxed, head tipped slightly back, mouth open or in a half-smile, one arm partly visible as if mid-gesture, hair cascading to one side. Overall style/mood: chic party-afterglow collage, celebrity-photo-booth vibe.
